message:
feat(hooks): implement runtime hook contract for allocator, reactor, clock, entropy, and log sinks (bd-hwb.13)

Runtime hook vtable system with five hook categories:
- Allocator hooks (malloc/realloc/free with context pointer)
- Clock hooks (wall-clock now_ns + deterministic logical clock)
- Entropy hooks (random_u64 with deterministic PRNG flag)
- Reactor hooks (live wait + ghost_reactor for deterministic replay)
- Log sink hooks (leveled message callback)

Key features:
- Hook initialization with safe defaults (stdlib malloc, stderr log)
- Deterministic mode validation: forbids ambient entropy, requires
  logical clock, requires ghost reactor if reactor configured
- Allocator seal (asx_runtime_seal_allocator) for hardened profiles
- Hook-backed runtime helpers that dispatch through active hook table
- Hook-specific error codes (12xx family)

13 unit tests covering: init, validation (live + deterministic modes),
allocator seal, dispatch, forbidden entropy, config defaults.

All 36 tests pass across 4 suites with -Werror.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
